name: sidebar
description: Sidebar — an ambient panel of AI agents that works alongside you in a live meeting. Built on Cerebras + Gemma 4.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c green,cyan "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared && tsc --noEmit -p apps/server && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web
